name: button-size
visual_summary: The Button Size component is a UI control that allows developers to create buttons of varying sizes. It is ideal for use cases where a button needs to stand out or fit a specific design requirements. This component helps maintain a consistent aesthetic across an application by enabling the use of standardized button sizes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-size
Description: The Button Size component is a UI control that allows developers to create buttons of varying sizes. It is ideal for use cases where a button needs to stand out or fit a specific design requirements. This component helps maintain a consistent aesthetic across an application by enabling the use of standardized button sizes.
Style: material-ui, flat-design
Interactions: clickable, tappable
Tags: Button, UI Control, Interaction, Form Element

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
